title: BarkinMad Coins in ZXPong
description: Earn BarkinMad Coins while playing ZXPong and unlock cosmetic paddle skins across supported ZX Series games.
summary: BarkinMad Coins reward your progress in ZXPong and unlock cosmetic rewards throughout the ZX Series.
heroImageAlt: BarkinMad Coins shared ZX Series rewards

images.caption: Earn and spend BarkinMad Coins across the ZX Series.

sections.heading: What Are BarkinMad Coins?
paragraphs: BarkinMad Coins are the shared reward system used across supported ZX Series games.
As you play ZXPong, you'll earn coins that can be used to unlock cosmetic paddle skins and other rewards across the ZX Series.

sections.heading: Earn Coins Through Gameplay
paragraphs: Collect coins during Solo matches and earn additional rewards based on your performance, AI difficulty, and longest rally.
Every match contributes to your shared BarkinMad Coins balance, giving you another reason to improve your skills and return for another game.

sections.heading: Unlock Paddle Skins
paragraphs: BarkinMad Coins can be used to unlock cosmetic paddle skins, allowing you to personalise your game without affecting gameplay balance.
Available skins include Classic, Red, Neon, Cyanic, Golden, and Obsidian.

faq.question: Do BarkinMad Coins have any real-world value?
faq.answer: No. BarkinMad Coins are an in-game reward used to unlock cosmetic content across supported ZX Series games. They have no cash value and cannot be exchanged for real money.

featureShowcases.heading: Play, Earn, Unlock
featureShowcases.summary: BarkinMad Coins reward regular play and unlock cosmetic paddle skins across the ZX Series.
body: Every match helps you earn BarkinMad Coins, giving you another reason to improve your skills, challenge stronger opponents, and keep playing.
Combined with achievements and leaderboards, BarkinMad Coins create a shared progression system that connects every supported ZX Series game.

image.caption: Every match brings you closer to your next unlock.
